---
title: Pi Day 2027
date: 2026-03-17
image: pi-day-2026.png
image-alt: Pi Day promotional flier
Note: 2:30 pm in 1S-214
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 100%
---

It’s (almost) Pi Day! A time to honor the beauty of circles, the brilliance of
3.1415..., and the joy of discovery. Let’s celebrate with creativity,
curiosity, and maybe even dessert!

**FOOD AND REFRESHMENTS PROVIDED!**
